input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.1
            TITLE: a supplement to the cost report that reflects any changes or corrections made after the

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.1: A supplement to the Cost Report that reflects any changes or corrections made after the
S.3.7.1 A supplement to the Cost Report that reflects any changes or corrections made after the 
submission of the Cost Report may be submitted.

final_answer: A supplement to the Cost Report that reflects any changes or corrections made after the submission of the Cost Report may be submitted.
